productDisplayName: Rockport Men's Carnforth Soft Brown Shoe
description: Talk about walking comfort in dress shoes, and there's no better brand that can offer it than rockport. To experience the delightful feeling of walking on air all day long, slip your feet into the Carnforth oxfords from rockport's Signature Series. Engineered with Dynamic Suspension technology, it is the perfect pair of formal shoes for those long hours at work. A great addition to any sophisticated man's wardrobe, it can add tons of character to your outfit in an instant.Upper Full-grain leather upper for added durability and style Nappa leather lining for moisture absorption and abrasion resistance Plain toe design for a neater, crisper look and extra durability Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Lightly padded tongue to protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blisters Leather wraparound overlay along the heel and midfoot for better support Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers for lightweight comfort Moisture-absorbent and odour-resistant ortholite footbed for all-day comfort Removable footbed to accomodate an orthotic Dynamic Suspension technology that creates a thin air cushion under the foot, moving according to the pressure of your foot from heel to toe, ensuring maximum comfort even with the slightest movement Outsole PU outsole for durability and shock absorption to reduce foot fatigue Stacked heel for better grip Textured pattern on the middle of the forefoot for better grip Grooves around the pattern, covering the rest of the forefoot for improving grip and traction on various surfaces Grooves on the heel for improved traction shoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shineDo not store in direct sunlight
